'''''Star Wars Gamemaster Kit''''' is a game accessory to ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' published by [[West End Games]]. It was co-written by [[Bill Smith]] and [[Ed Stark]]<ref name="GK" /> and published in September [[1991]].

The sourcebook was divided into ten sections: [[The Bissillirus Campaign]], which detailed the geography and [[Politics/Legends|political]] situation of the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector]]; Rebel cell construction, which took the form of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] briefing four new recruits on how to establish a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell; and eight interlinked adventures: ''[[Changing the Balance]]'', ''[[Rebel Enslaved!]]'', ''[[Return to Bundim]]'', ''[[Going My Way?]]'', ''[['Blades and Blasters]]'', ''[[Breakthrough in Bissillirus]]'', ''[[All Our Sins Remembered]]'', and [[Showdown (The Bissillirus Campaign)|''Showdown'']].<ref name="GK" />

{{Book-stub}}
